member.name: T:LJCNetCommon.LJCNetString
member.summary: Contains common string related static functions.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCNetString.HasValue(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a text value exists.
member.returns: true if the text has a value; otherwise false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCNetString.IsEqual(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Do an Ignore Case string compare.

member.name: T:LJCNetCommon.LJCTestCommon
member.summary: Provides test methods.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTestCommon.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an object instance.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTestCommon.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes an object instance with the supplied values.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTestCommon.Write(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes a compare message to the console.
member.param: Indicates if the values should be bracketed.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTestCommon.CompareMessage(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a compare message if the result value does not equal the compare value.
member.param: Indicates if the values should be bracketed.

member.name: T:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder
member.summary: Provides methods for creating text.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.#ctor(LJCNetCommon.LJCTextState)
member.summary: Initializes an object instance with the provided values.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.Clear
member.summary: Clears the Builder text.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.ToString
member.summary: Retrieves the object text.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.AddIndent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Changes the IndentCount by the provided value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.AddLine(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a text line without modification.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.AddText(System.String)
member.summary: Adds text without modification.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.Item(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a delimiter if not the first list item.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.Line(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a modified text line to the builder.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.
member.returns: The added, potentially modified text line.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.Text(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds modified text to the builder.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.EndsWithNewLine
member.summary: Indicates if the builder text ends with a newline.
member.returns: true if the current value ends with a newline; otherwise false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.StartWithNewLine(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Allow text to start with a newline.
member.param: Indicates if a new line is allowed.
member.returns: true if the text should start with a newline; otherwise false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.GetDelimited(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a delimiter if not the first list item.
member.returns: The text value with the potentially added delimiter.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.GetIndented(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a new potentially indented line.
member.returns: The text value with the potentially added indent.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.GetIndentString
member.summary: Returns the current indent string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.GetLine(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets a modified text line.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.GetText(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets potentially indented and wrapped text.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.GetWrapped(System.String)
member.summary: Gets added text and new wrapped line if combined line > LineLimit.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.Builder
member.summary: The internal StringBuilder class.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.DebugText
member.summary: The debug text.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.Delimiter
member.summary: Gets or sets the delimiter.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.HasText
member.summary: Gets a value indicating if the builder has text.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.IndentCharCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the indent character count.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.IndentCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the indent count.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.IndentLength
member.summary: Gets the current indent length.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.IsFirst
member.summary: Gets or sets the first item indicator.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.LineLength
member.summary: Gets the current length.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.LineLimit
member.summary: Gets the character limit.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.WrapAtDelimiter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if a wrap should occur at a leading delimiter.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.WrapEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if line wrapping is enabled.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextBuilder.WrapPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the new line prefix.

member.name: T:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser
member.summary: Contains parsing related methods.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an object instance.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.DelimitedString(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a delimited string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.FindTag(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Finds the first tag in a text value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.RemoveSection(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a section from a text value.
member.returns: The text with the section removed.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.RemoveTags(System.String)
member.summary: Removes tags from a text value.
member.returns: The text with the tags removed.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.StringWithDelimiters(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a string including the supplied delimiters.
member.returns: The delimited text including the delimiters.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.BeginIndex
member.summary: The delimited string begin index.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.EndIndex
member.summary: The delimited string end index.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextParser.StartIndex
member.summary: The parsing start index.

member.name: T:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextState
member.summary: Represents the text state.
Represents the text state.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextState.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes an object instance with the supplied values.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextState.IndentCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the current indent count to sync called method.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon.LJCTextState.ChildIndentCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the new indent count to sync calling method.
